_comment: Sample managed-markets config for Morpho Vault V2 — USDC markets on Ethereum mainnet. All addresses below are placeholders. Verify the correct oracle and lltv values on https://app.morpho.org before use. loanToken must equal the vault's underlying asset (USDC for a USDC vault). lltv is a WAD integer string (1e18 = 100%). 860000000000000000 = 86%. Caps (absoluteCap / relativeCap) are NOT stored here — they are configured on-chain by the curator via vault.increaseAbsoluteCap / vault.increaseRelativeCap. The deploy script defaults relativeCap to WAD (1e18 = 100%, meaning 'no relative cap'). NEVER set relativeCap to 0 on-chain — the bot will refuse to start if any managed market has relativeCap == 0 on any of its 3 cap ids.
label: USDC/WETH 86%
_oracleComment: Replace 0x000...001 with the actual Morpho-verified USDC/WETH oracle — verify on https://app.morpho.org
